calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-16-2010 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Mar-25-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Robert F. Cohen, Esq. appeared for plaintiff American Express Centurion Bank.
No appearance by defendant Robert Emmett O'Brien, an individual
Default was entered against defendant on January 10, 2010.
Doe defendants were dismissed on November 19. 2009.
Order waiving witness appearance at default prove-up hearing was filed on March 22, 2010.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff American Express Centurion Bank, and against the Defaulted Defendant Robert Emmett O'Brien, an individual as follows:

Damages/Principal - $59,180.84.
Prejudgment Interest - $11,216.64.
Attorney's Fees - Waived.
Costs - $435.00, for a total judgment in the amount of $70,832.48.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-28-2010 Continued To Apr-30-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 212
